body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
This PR fixes two small bugs 
- in our long runs, when I added the perturbed_run flag, the logic worked out so that all the "long runs" ran in addition to the "longer runs" when the LONGER_RUN flag was set. so the LONGER_RUN flag was not working as attended. This fixes the logic in the buildkite pipeline
see here: https://buildkite.com/clima/climaland-long-runs/builds/4256 vs our last "longer" run on main on Monday: https://buildkite.com/clima/climaland-long-runs/builds/4252. The regular "long" run on Monday worked as expected: https://buildkite.com/clima/climaland-long-runs/builds/4251
- output only liquid water for the first 10cm instead of liquid water and ice, to be comparable to the data @braghiere 

## To-do

- Proposed task
-->

- Solution implemented
-->

title: output liquid water only, fix pipeline bug
